method.grade: v2 — rest-of-season points ABOVE POSITIONAL REPLACEMENT (PAR) swung: for players received minus sent, weeks (trade week+1)..17; a player-week's PAR = weekly pts minus the season's fixed replacement level for his position; weeks with no stat line contribute 0
method.replacement: per season+position: median across weeks 1..17 of the rank-N weekly score, N = QB12, RB30, WR36, TE12, K12, DEF12
method.raw_secondary: raw rest-of-season points kept as a secondary column (net_ros_pts / swing_ros_pts)
